title: Contact Form 7 CAPTCHA Tutorial: Stop Spam with Animated Fields
description:
Contact Form 7 CAPTCHA: Learn how to stop Contact Form 7 spam effectively by using an Animated CAPTCHA that improves user experience.

In this WordPress tutorial, I guide you through the process of replacing outdated, hard-to-read anti-spam methods with a modern, animated alternative that keeps your forms clean and functional. This video covers everything you need to know about setting up and configuring this lightweight plugin to protect your website from bots while ensuring real visitors can easily submit your contact forms.

You will see how to integrate the CAPTCHA field, adjust settings for optimal performance, and use AJAX refresh features for a seamless submission process.

📚 Topics Covered:

✓ Installing the Animated CAPTCHA for Contact Form 7 plugin
✓ Configuring settings to balance security and usability
✓ Adding the CAPTCHA shortcode to your existing forms
✓ Understanding how AJAX refresh improves user interaction
✓ Testing your form to verify successful spam protection
✓ Best practices for reducing website form spam
✓ If you find this video helpful for your web design projects, please hit the like button, leave a comment with your questions, and subscribe to the channel for more WordPress and Elementor tutorials.
